input_text:
Running npm install was failing with "ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree" because two packages both required react as a peer dependency but specified different version ranges that did not overlap.

Fixed by adding a resolutions field to package.json pinning the shared react version to the range that satisfies both packages. npm install now completes cleanly.
reviewer_notes: npm peer-dependency conflict resolved via package.json resolutions. Resolved dependency issue.
